_comment: Explicit allowlist for the stray-English guard (13_stray_english.py).
Every entry is a DECISION that a piece of English may face a non-English reader:
keep it short, keep it justified, and prefer fixing a string over allowing it.
content_zone_selectors: official City Record notice text — deliberately English
(LL30 posture: notices are the official source; chrome around them translates).
allowed_terms: single tokens, CASE-SENSITIVE — acronyms and product names as printed
('PIN' the identifier passes; an untranslated 'Pin' button still fails).
allowed_phrases: multi-word proper nouns / official names, removed case-insensitively.
allowed_exact: whole text nodes allowed verbatim (bilingual-by-design strings).
